name: create-migration
description: Generate a Goose migration SQL file with multi-tenant columns and proper indexes
prompt:
Create a new Goose migration for table '{{tableName}}' in internal/infrastructure/postgres/migrations/.

Requirements:
- Include standard columns: id (UUID PRIMARY KEY), organization_id, app_id, created_at, updated_at
- Add custom columns: {{columns}}
- Add foreign key references to organizations(id) and apps(id)
- Add indexes on organization_id, app_id, and any foreign keys
- Include both -- +goose Up and -- +goose Down sections
- Use the next migration number based on existing files

Follow masterfabric_go migration conventions.

variables.name: columns
variables.description: Custom columns (e.g., name VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(50), price NUMERIC)
